description: Commission the dome at Siding Spring Observatory (-31.2722, 149.0661) according to the directive at ~/Documents/dome_commissioning_plan.txt. Ensure the 'indi_simulator_dome' driver is active and dome slaving is enabled. Record synchronized azimuth telemetry for Sirius, Canopus, and Alpha Centauri to ~/Documents/dome_sync_report.csv and save a screenshot of the slaving mechanism to ~/Documents/dome_slaved_evidence.png.
